MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Floyd Butler. The Plaintiff appearing in pro and the Defendant appearing in pro per and evidence having been introduced, the cause was submitted for decision.
